found_specs.title: EIP-7594: PeerDAS - Peer Data Availability Sampling
found_specs.description: Introducing simple DAS utilizing gossip distribution and peer requests. Extends EIP-4844 blobs using 1D erasure coding, column-based sampling, and introduces a 6-blob-per-transaction limit.

found_specs.title: EIP-7823: Set Upper Bounds for MODEXP
found_specs.description: Restricts each MODEXP precompile input field to a maximum of 8192 bits (1024 bytes) to reduce consensus bugs and simplify future EVMMAX replacement.

found_specs.title: EIP-7825: Transaction Gas Limit Cap
found_specs.description: Introduces a protocol-level cap on max gas per transaction to 16,777,216 (2^24) to enhance DoS resilience, improve network stability, and provide more predictable transaction processing.

found_specs.title: EIP-7883: ModExp Gas Cost Increase
found_specs.description: Modifies the ModExp precompile pricing algorithm from EIP-2565: increases minimum gas from 200 to 500, triples general cost, and doubles the cost for exponents larger than 32 bytes.

found_specs.title: EIP-7892: Blob Parameter Only Hardforks
found_specs.description: Defines BPO hardforks - a lightweight mechanism for incrementally scaling blob capacity through targeted hard forks that modify only blob-related parameters (target, max, baseFeeUpdateFraction).

found_specs.title: EIP-7917: Deterministic Proposer Lookahead
found_specs.description: Pre-calculates and stores a deterministic proposer_lookahead in the beacon state at the start of every epoch for MIN_SEED_LOOKAHEAD + 1 epochs. Fixes next-epoch proposer schedule non-determinism and enables based preconfirmation protocols.

found_specs.title: EIP-7918: Blob Base Fee Bounded by Execution Cost
found_specs.description: Imposes a reserve price (BLOB_BASE_COST=2^13 * base_fee_per_gas) on blobs via an if-clause in calc_excess_blob_gas(). Ensures the blob fee market functions properly and blob consumers pay a relevant fraction of the market rate for compute.

found_specs.title: EIP-7934: RLP Execution Block Size Limit
found_specs.description: Introduces a protocol-level cap on max RLP-encoded execution block size to 10 MiB (MAX_BLOCK_SIZE), with a 2 MiB safety margin for beacon blocks, yielding MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE of ~8 MiB.

found_specs.title: EIP-7935: Set Default Gas Limit to 60M
found_specs.description: Recommends EL clients update their default gas limit configuration to 60M for Fusaka, up from the current 36M mainnet gas limit.

found_specs.title: EIP-7939: Count Leading Zeros (CLZ) Opcode
found_specs.description: Introduces CLZ opcode (0x1e) that pops x from the stack and pushes the number of leading zero bits (256 if x=0). Gas cost is 5. Used in math operations, compression, bitmaps, and post-quantum signature schemes.

found_specs.title: EIP-7951: Precompile for secp256r1 Curve Support
found_specs.description: Adds P256VERIFY precompile at address 0x100 for secp256r1 ECDSA signature verification (6900 gas). Enables native support for Apple Secure Enclave, Android Keystore, and FIDO2/WebAuthn. Supersedes RIP-7212 with security fixes.

found_specs.title: Fulu -- The Beacon Chain
found_specs.description: Fulu consensus-layer beacon chain specification. Includes EIP-7594 (PeerDAS), EIP-7917 (deterministic proposer lookahead), and EIP-7892 (blob parameter only hardforks). Defines modified process_execution_payload, BeaconState with proposer_lookahead, BlobParameters, and compute_fork_digest.

found_specs.title: Fulu -- Data Availability Sampling Core
found_specs.description: Core DAS specification for Fulu. Defines DataColumnSidecar, MatrixEntry containers, custody groups (NUMBER_OF_CUSTODY_GROUPS=128, CUSTODY_REQUIREMENT=4, SAMPLES_PER_SLOT=8), get_custody_groups, compute_columns_for_custody_group, compute_matrix, and recover_matrix.

found_specs.title: Fulu -- Fork Choice
found_specs.description: Fork choice modification for Fulu. Modifies is_data_available to use column sidecars (retrieve_column_sidecars) instead of blob retrieval, and verifies data column sidecar KZG proofs.

found_specs.title: Fulu -- Fork
found_specs.description: Describes the Fulu upgrade process. Triggered at FULU_FORK_EPOCH. Defines upgrade_to_fulu function that transitions from Electra BeaconState, adding proposer_lookahead field (EIP-7917).

found_specs.title: Fulu -- Networking (P2P Interface)
found_specs.description: Consensus-layer networking spec for Fulu. Defines data column sidecar subnets (128), verification helpers, gossip topics, deprecated blob_sidecar topics, DataColumnSidecarsByRange/Root req/resp, ENR structure with custody group count and next fork digest, supernode specifications.

found_specs.title: Fulu -- Polynomial Commitments Sampling
found_specs.description: Extends polynomial-commitments with DAS functions. Defines Cell type (64 field elements), CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB=128, compute_cells_and_kzg_proofs, verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch, recover_cells_and_kzg_proofs. Includes FFT helpers, KZG multiproofs, and reconstruction algorithms.

found_specs.title: Fulu -- Honest Validator
found_specs.description: Honest validator guide for Fulu. Defines VALIDATOR_CUSTODY_REQUIREMENT=8, BALANCE_PER_ADDITIONAL_CUSTODY_GROUP=32 ETH, modified BlobsBundle with cell KZG proofs, get_data_column_sidecars construction, sidecar publishing and retention requirements.

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Blocks
found_specs.description: Defines Block, Header, Withdrawal, Log, and Receipt data structures for the Osaka fork. Header includes blob_gas_used, excess_blob_gas, parent_beacon_block_root, and requests_hash fields.

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Bloom
found_specs.description: Implements Ethereum logs bloom filter functions: add_to_bloom and logs_bloom for the Osaka fork.

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Exceptions
found_specs.description: Fork-specific exceptions including TransactionTypeError, TransactionGasLimitExceededError (EIP-7825), BlobGasLimitExceededError, BlobCountExceededError, InitCodeTooLargeError, and others.

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Fork (Entry Point)
found_specs.description: Main fork entry point. Defines state_transition, validate_header, apply_body, check_transaction. Includes constants: MAX_BLOCK_SIZE=10MiB (EIP-7934), MAX_RLP_BLOCK_SIZE=8MiB, BLOB_COUNT_LIMIT=6. Implements calculate_base_fee_per_gas and calculate_excess_blob_gas.

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Fork Types
found_specs.description: Core type definitions for Osaka fork: Account, Address, Root, VersionedHash, Bloom, Authorization, encode_account, and EMPTY_ACCOUNT.

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Requests
found_specs.description: EIP-7685 request framework. Defines deposit, withdrawal, and consolidation request types. Implements extract_deposit_data, parse_deposit_requests, and compute_requests_hash (SHA2-256).

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- State
found_specs.description: State management for Osaka fork. Defines State and TransientStorage classes, account CRUD operations, storage operations, state snapshotting (begin/commit/rollback_transaction), and state_root computation.

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Transactions
found_specs.description: Transaction types for Osaka: LegacyTransaction, AccessListTransaction, FeeMarketTransaction, BlobTransaction, SetCodeTransaction. Defines TX_MAX_GAS_LIMIT=16,777,216 (EIP-7825), TX_BASE_COST=21000, FLOOR_CALLDATA_COST=10, and transaction encoding/decoding/validation.

found_specs.title: Osaka Execution Spec -- Trie
found_specs.description: Merkle Patricia Trie implementation for Osaka fork. Defines Trie, LeafNode, ExtensionNode, BranchNode, trie_set, trie_get, root computation, nibble encoding, and EMPTY_TRIE_ROOT.
